ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield percentage */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value indicating volatility */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on the given date */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient for stock splits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time price data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price data */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded at the current price */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Current bid price */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Current ask price */,
  "last_trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the watchlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist stock entry */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio stock entry */,
  "last_traded_price" REAL /* Last traded price of the stock */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value at which the alert should be triggered */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was created */,
  "last_triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Preferred timezone (e.g., UTC, EST) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language (e.g., en, fr) */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Preferred type of chart (e.g., line, candlestick) */,
  "notification_preference" TEXT /* Preference for receiving notifications (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to user preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
